name: Trusted Credit Repair
description_short: Trusted Credit Repair is a credit repair provider based in Margate, Florida. Rated 4.9/5 with 368 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Trusted Credit Repair is a Margate, Florida-based financial services firm offering credit repair and counseling to consumers in South Florida and beyond. Operating out of Broward County, the company appears to serve clients who need hands-on help disputing inaccurate or negative items from their credit reports, with the goal of improving scores and expanding borrowing options. Their unusually strong Google rating — 4.9 out of 5 stars from 368 reviews — places them among the higher-rated local credit repair providers in the region.

What distinguishes Trusted Credit Repair from many single-service shops is their dual footprint in both credit counseling and tax preparation services. This combination suggests the firm operates as a broader financial wellness practice rather than a narrowly focused dispute mill. Consumers dealing with both IRS-related debt issues and damaged credit histories may find value in working with a provider who understands how tax liabilities, liens, and garnishments interact with credit profiles. The credit counseling designation also implies an educational component, which is a positive signal — quality credit repair firms help clients understand the factors driving their scores, not just send dispute letters.

Before engaging Trusted Credit Repair, consumers should understand a few things. Credit repair companies operating in Florida are subject to the federal Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which prohibits charging upfront fees before services are rendered and requires a written contract with a three-day cancellation window. Prospective clients should request a written service agreement, confirm the specific items the company plans to dispute, and ask how progress will be communicated. If any inaccurate information exists on your reports, you have the right to dispute it directly with the bureaus at no cost — a fact reputable credit counselors will tell you upfront.

The 4.9-star average from 368 reviewers is a meaningful signal in a category where fly-by-night operators are common. That volume of reviews is hard to fake and suggests a real, active client base with largely positive outcomes. The tax preparation sideline adds credibility — tax pros carry regulatory accountability that pure credit repair shops do not. That said, consumers outside South Florida should confirm whether the firm handles remote engagements, and anyone with complex credit issues (bankruptcy, identity theft, multiple collection accounts) should ask directly about the firm's experience with their specific situation before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptionally high Google rating of 4.9/5 from 368 verified reviews, well above category average
Dual expertise in credit counseling and tax preparation may benefit clients with tax-related credit damage (liens, garnishments)
Established local presence in Broward County with apparent long-term client relationships based on review volume
Credit counseling designation suggests educational approach, not just dispute volume tactics
South Florida location with likely familiarity serving diverse, multilingual client populations
Independent local firm — clients may receive more personalized attention than with national chain providers
cons: No publicly listed pricing or service packages visible on the website, making cost comparisons difficult before a consultation
Tax preparation as a secondary service may indicate limited specialization depth compared to dedicated credit repair firms
Physical office in Margate may limit accessibility for consumers outside South Florida unless remote services are confirmed
Like all credit repair services, results depend entirely on whether negative items are genuinely inaccurate — legitimate negative items cannot be legally removed
best_for: Consumers in Margate, Florida looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: Trusted Credit Repair is best suited for South Florida consumers with verifiable errors on their credit reports who want a locally accountable firm with a strong community reputation, particularly those who may also need tax-related financial guidance. The main caveat is that prospective clients should request a written CROA-compliant agreement upfront and verify the firm's specific dispute process before paying any fees.
services: Credit report dispute filing with all three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Inaccurate negative item removal (late payments, collections, charge-offs)
Credit counseling and score improvement coaching
IRS tax lien and tax debt consultation
Identity theft and fraudulent account dispute assistance
Goodwill letter and pay-for-delete negotiation support
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
